texto: For those of you in the cheap seats I'd like ya to clap your hands to this one
autor: the rest of you can just rattle your jewelry!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a the rest of you can just rattle your jewelry!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “For those of you in the cheap seats I'd like ya to clap your hands to this one” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, john-lennon, those pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
